ar.err.not_found: No SwitchBot BLE device matched the provided mac_address.
ar.err.ambiguous_target: Multiple SwitchBot BLE devices matched the provided device_name.
ar.err.invalid_argument: Either mac_address or device_name is required.
ar.err.value_required: The value field is required for set_value.
ar.err.invalid_value_range: The value field must be between 0 and 100.
ar.err.invalid_value_type: The value field must be an integer.
ar.err.unsupported_device: The matched device does not look like a SwitchBot BLE device.
ar.tool.description: Control a nearby SwitchBot BLE device and return a JSON or text result.
ar.param.devname.description: Optional device name filter. Matches by exact name or substring.
ar.param.value.description: Optional numeric value for set_value actions. Range: 0-100.
ar.err.no_writable_characteristic: The device did not expose a writable GATT characteristic suitable for control.
ar.err.bleak_missing:
Error: 'bleak' library is not installed. Please install it using:
pip install bleak
ar.err.linux_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[Linux/Raspberry Pi Permission Guide]
You might lack permissions to access the Bluetooth socket. Try one of the following:
1. Add your user to the bluetooth group (recommended):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Requires restart or re-login)
2. Grant permissions directly to the Python binary:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
ar.err.macos_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[macOS Permission Guide]
Bluetooth access might have been denied by macOS security restrictions.
Please open 'System Settings > Privacy & Security > Bluetooth' and ensure your terminal, VS Code, or Python process is allowed to access Bluetooth.

el.param.timeout.description: Λήξη χρονικού ορίου σάρωσης/σύνδεσης σε δευτερόλεπτα.
el.err.not_found: Καμία συσκευή SwitchBot BLE δεν ταιριάζει με την παρεχόμενη mac_address.
el.err.ambiguous_target: Πολλές συσκευές SwitchBot BLE αντιστοιχούσαν στο παρεχόμενο όνομα_συσκευής.
el.err.value_required: Ο έλεγχος ECHONET Lite ολοκληρώθηκε: {action} στο {ip_address} σε {elapsed_ms} ms.
el.err.invalid_value_range: Το πεδίο τιμής απαιτείται για το set_value.
el.msg.summary: Ο έλεγχος SwitchBot BLE ολοκληρώθηκε: {action} στο {device_name} ({device_id}).
el.err.invalid_numeric: Το χρονικό όριο λήξης πρέπει να είναι ακέραιος.
el.err.invalid_range: Το χρονικό όριο λήξης πρέπει να είναι μεγαλύτερο από 0.
el.err.invalid_value_type: Το πεδίο τιμής πρέπει να είναι ακέραιος.
el.err.unsupported_device: Η αντιστοιχισμένη συσκευή δεν μοιάζει με συσκευή SwitchBot BLE.
el.tool.description: Ελέγξτε μια κοντινή συσκευή SwitchBot BLE και επιστρέψτε ένα αποτέλεσμα JSON ή κειμένου.
el.param.devname.description: Προαιρετικό φίλτρο ονόματος συσκευής. Ταιριάζει με ακριβές όνομα ή υποσυμβολοσειρά.
el.param.value.description: Προαιρετική αριθμητική τιμή για ενέργειες set_value. Εύρος: 0-100.
el.err.no_writable_characteristic: Η συσκευή δεν εξέθεσε ένα εγγράψιμο χαρακτηριστικό GATT κατάλληλο για έλεγχο.
el.err.bleak_missing:
Σφάλμα: Η βιβλιοθήκη 'blaak' δεν έχει εγκατασταθεί. Εγκαταστήστε το χρησιμοποιώντας:
pip install bleak
el.err.linux_permission:
Σφάλμα κατά τη λειτουργία BLE: {err_msg}

[Οδηγός άδειας Linux/Raspberry Pi]
Ενδέχεται να μην έχετε δικαιώματα πρόσβασης στην υποδοχή Bluetooth. Δοκιμάστε ένα από τα παρακάτω:
1. Προσθέστε τον χρήστη σας στην ομάδα bluetooth (συνιστάται):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Απαιτεί επανεκκίνηση ή επανασύνδεση)
2. Εκχωρήστε δικαιώματα απευθείας στο δυαδικό αρχείο Python:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
el.err.macos_permission:
Σφάλμα κατά τη λειτουργία BLE: {err_msg}

[Οδηγός άδειας macOS]
Η πρόσβαση Bluetooth ενδέχεται να έχει απορριφθεί από περιορισμούς ασφαλείας του macOS.
Ανοίξτε τις «Ρυθμίσεις συστήματος > Απόρρητο και ασφάλεια > Bluetooth» και βεβαιωθείτε ότι το τερματικό σας, ο Κωδικός VS ή η διαδικασία Python επιτρέπεται να έχει πρόσβαση στο Bluetooth.

he.err.not_found: שום מכשיר SwitchBot BLE לא תואם לכתובת ה-mac_dat שסופקה.
he.err.ambiguous_target: התקני SwitchBot BLE מרובים תואמים ל-device_name שסופק.
he.err.value_required: שגיאה: כתובת ה-ip_address חייבת להיות כתובת IPv4 חוקית.
he.err.invalid_value_range: בקרת ECHONET Lite הושלמה: {action} ב-{ip_address} בעוד {elapsed_ms} אלפיות השנייה.
he.err.invalid_numeric: הזמן הקצוב חייב להיות מספר שלם.
he.err.invalid_range: הזמן הקצוב חייב להיות גדול מ-0.
he.err.invalid_value_type: שדה הערך חייב להיות מספר שלם.
he.err.unsupported_device: המכשיר המותאם לא נראה כמו מכשיר SwitchBot BLE.
he.tool.description: שלוט במכשיר SwitchBot BLE קרוב והחזר תוצאת JSON או טקסט.
he.param.devname.description: מסנן שמות מכשיר אופציונלי. התאמות לפי שם מדויק או מחרוזת משנה.
he.param.value.description: ערך מספרי אופציונלי עבור פעולות set_value. טווח: 0-100.
he.err.no_writable_characteristic: המכשיר לא חשף מאפיין GATT בר כתיבה המתאים לשליטה.
he.err.bleak_missing:
שגיאה: ספריית 'עגומה' אינה מותקנת. נא להתקין אותו באמצעות:
pip install beak
he.err.linux_permission:
שגיאה במהלך פעולת BLE: {err_msg}

[מדריך הרשאות לינוקס/Raspberry Pi]
ייתכן שחסרות לך הרשאות לגשת לשקע ה-Bluetooth. נסה אחת מהאפשרויות הבאות:
1. הוסף את המשתמש שלך לקבוצת ה-Bluetooth (מומלץ):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (דורש הפעלה מחדש או התחברות מחדש)
2. הענק הרשאות ישירות לקובץ הבינארי של Python:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
he.err.macos_permission:
שגיאה במהלך פעולת BLE: {err_msg}

[מדריך הרשאות macOS]
ייתכן שהגישה ל-Bluetooth נדחתה על ידי הגבלות האבטחה של macOS.
פתח את 'הגדרות מערכת > פרטיות ואבטחה > Bluetooth' וודא שהטרמינל, קוד VS או תהליך Python שלך רשאים לגשת ל-Bluetooth.

hu.err.not_found: Egy SwitchBot BLE eszköz sem felel meg a megadott mac_addressnek.
hu.err.ambiguous_target: Több SwitchBot BLE-eszköz egyezik a megadott eszköznévvel.
hu.err.invalid_argument: A mac_address vagy az eszköz_neve megadása kötelező.
hu.err.value_required: Az értékmezőnek 0 és 100 között kell lennie.
hu.err.invalid_value_range: Hiba: a(z) „{action}” művelet még nem támogatott a(z) {kind} esetében.
hu.msg.summary: SwitchBot BLE vezérlés befejezve: {action} a következőn: {device_name} ({device_id}).
hu.err.invalid_numeric: Az időtúllépésnek egész számnak kell lennie.
hu.err.invalid_value_type: Az értékmezőnek egész számnak kell lennie.
hu.err.unsupported_device: Az egyező eszköz nem úgy néz ki, mint egy SwitchBot BLE eszköz.
hu.tool.description: Egy közeli SwitchBot BLE-eszköz vezérlése, és JSON- vagy szöveges eredmény visszaadása.
hu.param.devname.description: Opcionális eszköznévszűrő. Pontos név vagy részkarakterlánc szerint egyezik.
hu.param.value.description: Opcionális numerikus érték a set_value műveletekhez. Tartomány: 0-100.
hu.err.no_writable_characteristic: Az eszköz nem tett fel vezérlésre alkalmas írható GATT-karakterisztikát.
hu.err.bleak_missing:
Hiba: a 'sivár' könyvtár nincs telepítve. Kérjük, telepítse a következő használatával:
pip install bleak
hu.err.linux_permission:
Hiba a BLE művelet során: {err_msg}

[Linux/Raspberry Pi engedélyezési útmutató]
Előfordulhat, hogy nincs engedélye a Bluetooth aljzat eléréséhez. Próbálkozzon az alábbiak egyikével:
1. Adja hozzá felhasználóját a Bluetooth csoporthoz (ajánlott):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Újraindítást vagy újrajelentkezést igényel)
2. Adjon engedélyt közvetlenül a Python binárisnak:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(mely python))
hu.err.macos_permission:
Hiba a BLE művelet közben: {err_msg}

[macOS engedélyek útmutató]
A Bluetooth-hozzáférést megtagadhatták a macOS biztonsági korlátozások.
Nyissa meg a „Rendszerbeállítások > Adatvédelem és biztonság > Bluetooth” menüpontot, és győződjön meg arról, hogy terminálja, VS-kódja vagy Python-folyamata hozzáfér a Bluetooth-hoz.

ro.param.fmt.description: Inspectați sau ștergeți memoria cache ECHONET Lite partajată.
ro.err.not_found: Niciun dispozitiv SwitchBot BLE nu se potrivește cu adresa mac_address furnizată.
ro.err.ambiguous_target: Mai multe dispozitive SwitchBot BLE se potriveau cu device_name furnizat.
ro.err.invalid_argument: Este necesar fie adresa mac, fie numele dispozitivului.
ro.err.value_required: Eroare: acțiunea „{action}” nu este încă acceptată pentru {kind}.
ro.err.invalid_value_range: Eroare: clasa de dispozitiv „{target}” nu este încă acceptată.
ro.err.invalid_numeric: Timeout trebuie să fie un număr întreg.
ro.err.invalid_range: Timeout trebuie să fie mai mare decât 0.
ro.err.invalid_value_type: Câmpul de valoare trebuie să fie un număr întreg.
ro.err.unsupported_device: Dispozitivul potrivit nu arată ca un dispozitiv SwitchBot BLE.
ro.tool.description: Controlați un dispozitiv SwitchBot BLE din apropiere și returnați un rezultat JSON sau text.
ro.param.devname.description: Filtru opțional pentru numele dispozitivului. Se potrivește după nume exact sau subșir.
ro.param.value.description: Valoare numerică opțională pentru acțiunile set_value. Interval: 0-100.
ro.err.no_writable_characteristic: Dispozitivul nu a expus o caracteristică GATT inscriptabilă potrivită pentru control.
ro.err.bleak_missing:
Eroare: biblioteca 'bliak' nu este instalată. Instalați-l folosind:
pip install bleak
ro.err.linux_permission:
Eroare în timpul operației BLE: {err_msg}

[Ghid de permisiuni Linux/Raspberry Pi]
Este posibil să nu aveți permisiuni pentru a accesa priza Bluetooth. Încercați una dintre următoarele:
1. Adăugați utilizatorul dvs. în grupul bluetooth (recomandat):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Necesită repornire sau reconectare)
2. Acordați permisiuni direct binarului Python:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
ro.err.macos_permission:
Eroare în timpul operației BLE: {err_msg}

[Ghid de permisiuni macOS]
Este posibil ca accesul Bluetooth să fi fost refuzat de restricțiile de securitate macOS.
Deschideți „Setări de sistem > Confidențialitate și securitate > Bluetooth” și asigurați-vă că terminalul, codul VS sau procesul Python au permisiunea de a accesa Bluetooth.

nb.err.not_found: No SwitchBot BLE device matched the provided mac_address.
nb.err.ambiguous_target: Multiple SwitchBot BLE devices matched the provided device_name.
nb.err.invalid_argument: Either mac_address or device_name is required.
nb.err.value_required: The value field is required for set_value.
nb.err.invalid_value_range: The value field must be between 0 and 100.
nb.err.invalid_value_type: The value field must be an integer.
nb.err.unsupported_device: The matched device does not look like a SwitchBot BLE device.
nb.tool.description: Control a nearby SwitchBot BLE device and return a JSON or text result.
nb.param.devname.description: Optional device name filter. Matches by exact name or substring.
nb.param.value.description: Optional numeric value for set_value actions. Range: 0-100.
nb.err.no_writable_characteristic: The device did not expose a writable GATT characteristic suitable for control.
nb.err.bleak_missing:
Error: 'bleak' library is not installed. Please install it using:
pip install bleak
nb.err.linux_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[Linux/Raspberry Pi Permission Guide]
You might lack permissions to access the Bluetooth socket. Try one of the following:
1. Add your user to the bluetooth group (recommended):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Requires restart or re-login)
2. Grant permissions directly to the Python binary:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
nb.err.macos_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[macOS Permission Guide]
Bluetooth access might have been denied by macOS security restrictions.
Please open 'System Settings > Privacy & Security > Bluetooth' and ensure your terminal, VS Code, or Python process is allowed to access Bluetooth.

Please open 'System Settings > Privacy & Security > Bluetooth' and ensure your terminal, VS Code, or Python process is allowed to access Bluetooth.

th.err.not_found: No SwitchBot BLE device matched the provided mac_address.
th.err.ambiguous_target: Multiple SwitchBot BLE devices matched the provided device_name.
th.err.invalid_argument: Either mac_address or device_name is required.
th.err.value_required: The value field is required for set_value.
th.err.invalid_value_range: The value field must be between 0 and 100.
th.err.invalid_value_type: The value field must be an integer.
th.err.unsupported_device: The matched device does not look like a SwitchBot BLE device.
th.tool.description: Control a nearby SwitchBot BLE device and return a JSON or text result.
th.param.devname.description: Optional device name filter. Matches by exact name or substring.
th.param.value.description: Optional numeric value for set_value actions. Range: 0-100.
th.err.no_writable_characteristic: The device did not expose a writable GATT characteristic suitable for control.
th.err.bleak_missing:
Error: 'bleak' library is not installed. Please install it using:
pip install bleak
th.err.linux_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}

[Linux/Raspberry Pi Permission Guide]
You might lack permissions to access the Bluetooth socket. Try one of the following:
1. Add your user to the bluetooth group (recommended):
   sudo usermod -aG bluetooth $USER
   (Requires restart or re-login)
2. Grant permissions directly to the Python binary:
   sudo setcap 'cap_net_raw,cap_net_admin+eip' $(readlink -f $(which python))
th.err.macos_permission:
Error during BLE operation: {err_msg}
